description: Production triage view for Codex Pooler memory spikes, BEAM memory attribution, pod restarts, and stream-buffer pressure

links.title: Kubernetes pod details
links.tooltip: Open the generic pod dashboard for the same namespace/pod selection

targets.expr: max((max by (pod) (container_memory_working_set_bytes{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"${pod:regex}", container="app", image!=""}) / max by (pod) (kube_pod_container_resource_limits{cluster="$cluster", namespace="$namespace", pod=~"${pod:regex}", resource="memory", exported_container="app"})))
sum by () (max by (pod, name) (increase(container_oom_events_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"${pod:regex}", container="app"}[30m])))
max by (pod) (kube_pod_container_resource_limits{cluster="$cluster", namespace="$namespace", pod=~"${pod:regex}", resource="memory", exported_container="app"})

panels.title: BEAM Run Queue
panels.description: Total, CPU, and IO scheduler queues. Sudden growth usually means the VM is saturated or blocked on external work.

targets.expr: clamp_min(max by (pod) (container_memory_working_set_bytes{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"${pod:regex}", container="app", image!=""}) - on (pod) vm_memory_total_bytes{namespace="$namespace", job="codex-pooler-app", pod=~"${pod:regex}"}, 0)

panels.title: Cgroup Minus BEAM
panels.description: Container working set not accounted for by BEAM total memory. Use this to separate BEAM heap/binary growth from native allocator, libc, NIF, or cgroup accounting pressure.

panels.title: Container RSS / Cache
panels.description: Cgroup memory categories from cAdvisor. RSS rising with flat BEAM memory points outside normal BEAM heap attribution.

targets.expr: sum by (pod) (rate(container_cpu_cfs_throttled_periods_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"${pod:regex}", container="app", image!=""}[$__rate_interval])) / clamp_min(sum by (pod) (rate(container_cpu_cfs_periods_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"${pod:regex}", container="app", image!=""}[$__rate_interval])), 0.001)

panels.title: CPU Throttling Ratio
panels.description: CPU throttling can stretch request lifetimes and queues, increasing memory retained by in-flight requests.

panels.title: Workload Memory by Component
panels.description: App, worker, and scheduler cgroup memory in one view. App Prometheus metrics are scraped from the app service; worker/scheduler visibility here comes from Kubernetes cgroup metrics.

panels.title: CPU Usage
panels.description: App container CPU usage in cores. Correlate CPU spikes with request rate, DB query pressure, run queue, and admission queueing.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, pod) (rate(phoenix_endpoint_stop_duration_seconds_bucket{namespace="$namespace", job="codex-pooler-app", pod=~"${pod:regex}"}[$__rate_interval])))

topk(8, histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, route) (rate(phoenix_router_dispatch_stop_duration_seconds_bucket{namespace="$namespace", job="codex-pooler-app", pod=~"${pod:regex}"}[$__rate_interval]))) and on (route) (sum by (route) (rate(phoenix_router_dispatch_stop_duration_seconds_count{namespace="$namespace", job="codex-pooler-app", pod=~"${pod:regex}"}[$__rate_interval])) > 0))

panels.title: Slowest Routes p95
panels.description: Top active routes by p95 latency. The active-route filter avoids stale NaN/empty legend rows when a route has no observations in the current interval.

targets.expr: sum by (buffer, transport, route_class, endpoint) (rate(codex_pooler_gateway_stream_buffer_oversized_count_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"${pod:regex}"}[$__rate_interval]) or rate(codex_pooler_gateway_stream_buffer_oversized_count{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"${pod:regex}"}[$__rate_interval]))

sum by (buffer, transport, route_class, endpoint) (rate(codex_pooler_gateway_stream_buffer_truncated_count_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"${pod:regex}"}[$__rate_interval]) or rate(codex_pooler_gateway_stream_buffer_truncated_count{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"${pod:regex}"}[$__rate_interval]))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, buffer, transport, route_class, endpoint) (rate(codex_pooler_gateway_stream_buffer_oversized_bytes_bucket{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"${pod:regex}"}[$__rate_interval])))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, buffer, transport, route_class, endpoint) (rate(codex_pooler_gateway_stream_buffer_truncated_bytes_bucket{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"${pod:regex}"}[$__rate_interval])))

panels.title: HTTP Status Class Rate
panels.description: Low-cardinality request outcome rate. Use this to separate traffic growth from error storms.

panels.title: Admission Events
panels.description: Local gateway bulkhead pressure by route class and transport. Queue/reject/timeout spikes show admission backpressure before memory climbs.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, route_class, transport) (rate(codex_pooler_gateway_admission_dequeued_time_seconds_bucket{namespace="$namespace", job="codex-pooler-app", pod=~"${pod:regex}"}[$__rate_interval])))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, route_class, transport) (rate(codex_pooler_gateway_admission_timeout_time_seconds_bucket{namespace="$namespace", job="codex-pooler-app", pod=~"${pod:regex}"}[$__rate_interval])))

panels.title: Admission Queue Time p95
panels.description: Time requests spent waiting in local admission queues before execution or timeout.

targets.expr: sum by (pod) (rate(codex_pooler_repo_query_count{namespace="$namespace", job="codex-pooler-app", pod=~"${pod:regex}"}[$__rate_interval])) / clamp_min(sum by (pod) (rate(phoenix_endpoint_stop_count{namespace="$namespace", job="codex-pooler-app", pod=~"${pod:regex}"}[$__rate_interval])), 0.001)
topk(10, sum by (source, command) (rate(codex_pooler_repo_query_count{namespace="$namespace", job="codex-pooler-app", pod=~"${pod:regex}"}[$__rate_interval])))

panels.title: Hot Query Sources
panels.description: Top Ecto query sources by safe source and SQL command. Source falls back to a sanitized table identifier for raw SQL when available.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, source, command) (rate(codex_pooler_repo_query_total_time_seconds_bucket{namespace="$namespace", job="codex-pooler-app", pod=~"${pod:regex}"}[$__rate_interval])))
histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, source, command) (rate(codex_pooler_repo_query_query_time_seconds_bucket{namespace="$namespace", job="codex-pooler-app", pod=~"${pod:regex}"}[$__rate_interval])))
histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, pod) (rate(codex_pooler_repo_query_queue_time_seconds_bucket{namespace="$namespace", job="codex-pooler-app", pod=~"${pod:regex}"}[$__rate_interval])))
sum by (pod, command) (rate(codex_pooler_repo_query_count{namespace="$namespace", job="codex-pooler-app", pod=~"${pod:regex}", source="unknown"}[$__rate_interval]))

panels.title: Unknown Query Rate
panels.description: Source-less queries that could not be mapped to a safe Ecto source or table identifier. This should shrink after the richer telemetry deploy.

panels.title: Query Command Mix
panels.description: SQL command mix across repository queries. Useful for spotting unexpected write or transaction churn during incidents.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, source, command) (rate(codex_pooler_repo_query_queue_time_seconds_bucket{namespace="$namespace", job="codex-pooler-app", pod=~"${pod:regex}"}[$__rate_interval])))

panels.title: Repo Queue Time by Source p95
panels.description: Database connection checkout pressure by safe source and command.

targets.expr: sum by (pod) (max by (pod, name) (increase(container_oom_events_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"${pod:regex}", container="app"}[$__rate_interval])))

panels.title: Current Pods Last Terminated Reason
panels.description: Current kube-state-metrics lastState.terminated reason for live pods only. Deleted pod history is covered by restart and OOM panels, not this table.

title: Codex Pooler / Memory Triage
